```
THE INCORPORATION OF THE SDGs IN THE NATIONAL FRAMEWORK 39 Protectng labour rights (SDG 8.8, 8.3, 8.7) Health and Safety at Work Achieving a safe and healthy working environment consttutes a key feature of socio-economic welfare and progress in a modern and well-organised society. ## Example 793
```

### Text

```
110 Voluntary Local Review 2022 | City of Dortmund Indicators Drinking water consumption 12.2 Waste amount 12.5 Drinking water is one of the most precious resources, especially in view of increasing periods of drought and hot summers.
```
